task: I had a minor car issue come up and I’m trying to make sure I’d handle it the right way if it turned into an insurance thing. Can you help me make a simple checklist of what to do and what details to save so I’m not scrambling later?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a simple, practical checklist you can keep handy if a minor car issue ever turns into an insurance claim.

## At the scene / right away
- **Stay safe first**
  - Move to a safe spot if you can.
  - Turn on hazard lights.
  - Check whether anyone is injured.

- **Document what happened**
  - Take clear photos of:
    - All vehicles involved
    - License plates
    - Damage from multiple angles
    - The surrounding area
    - Road signs, traffic lights, skid marks, debris, weather/road conditions
  - If it’s safe, take a short video too.

- **Exchange basic info**
  - Full name
  - Phone number
  - Insurance company and policy number
  - Driver’s license number
  - License plate number
  - Vehicle make/model/color

- **Get witness info**
  - Names and contact info of anyone who saw it happen.

- **Write down your own notes**
  - Date and time
  - Exact location
  - What happened, step by step
  - Direction each vehicle was traveling
  - Any police report number, if applicable

## Soon after
- **Notify your insurance company**
  - Report the incident promptly, even if damage seems minor.
  - Ask what they need from you and whether they want repair estimates.

- **Save all records**
  - Photos/videos
  - Notes
  - Police report
  - Tow or roadside assistance receipts
  - Repair estimates and invoices
  - Rental car receipts, if relevant
  - Any emails or texts with the other driver or insurer

## Helpful details to keep in one place
Create a note or folder with:
- Date/time/location
- Other driver’s info
- Witness info
- Insurance claim number
- Adjuster name and contact info
- Repair shop name and estimate
- Out-of-pocket costs
- Timeline of all calls/messages

## A simple rule of thumb
If it might matter later, **save it now**:
- photos
- names
- numbers
- receipts
- messages

If you want, I can turn this into a **one-page phone checklist** or a **fillable template** you can save in your notes app.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, this is solid. Simple and usable, which is what I wanted. The only thing I’d add is: keep the dashcam footage too, if there is any, and back everything up somewhere besides your phone. Learned that the hard way with work files — one copy is never enough. Otherwise this checklist covers the main stuff.
